title: lonchocarpus riparius
intro: Lonchocarpus riparius, also known as the river-heart or baboon mango, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its seeds, which contain compounds that exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Lonchocarpus riparius include the ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Lonchocarpus riparius seeds typically involve extraction of the bioactive compounds, which can be used in the form of capsules, teas, or tinctures.
